# Covers JetBrains IDEs: IntelliJ, RubyMine, PhpStorm, AppCode, PyCharm, CLion, Android Studio, WebStorm and Rider
# Reference: https://intellij-support.jetbrains.com/hc/en-us/articles/206544839

# User-specific stuff
.idea/**/workspace.xml
.idea/**/tasks.xml
.idea/**/usage.statistics.xml
.idea/**/dictionaries
.idea/**/shelf

# Generated files
.idea/**/contentModel.xml
.idea/misc.xml
.idea/vcs.xml
.idea/modules.xml
.idea/libraries

# Gradle
.gradle/
build/

# Maven
target/

# SBT
.idea_modules/

# Node.js
node_modules/

# VS Code
.vscode/

# Comment out for an IntelliJ plugin project that offers a custom language
# .idea/inspectionProfiles/pack.xml
